parsed.clarification_question: Which focus do you want for this paragraph? A) Writing polish and readability (R1.6), B) Argument and evidence check—logical consistency and whether claims match the reported results (R1.2, R1.3), C) Conceptual reframing of the contribution/claims (R1.1), D) Novelty positioning vs nearest prior work (R1.4). Reply with one or two letters (e.g., A, or B+C).

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified (“Take a look”), so we disclose uncertainty and ask for a concrete focus.
rationale.RX.2: To avoid overclaiming, we refrain from assuming a task (e.g., polishing vs. evidence check) without direction.
rationale.RX.3: We will strictly scope any subsequent work to this provided paragraph and its stated results only.
rationale.RX.4: Given the topic involves user attention and privacy, we will avoid recommendations that could enable manipulative or harmful practices.
rationale.RX.5: Any assessment will trace judgments directly to the provided text and its internally stated methods and results.
